record.field: Your family member has arrived safely – Global Brigades

✓ Safe Arrival Notification

Global Brigades Program Update

Dear {{ object.partner_id.gb_emergency_contact_id.name }},

We are pleased to inform you that {{ object.partner_id.name }} has arrived safely and is now participating in the Global Brigades program.

Brigade: {{ object.brigade_id.name }}

Program: {{ object.brigade_id.brigade_program or 'N/A' }}

% if object.brigade_id.arrival_date:

Arrival Date: {{ object.brigade_id.arrival_date }}

% endif % if object.brigade_id.departure_date:

Departure Date: {{ object.brigade_id.departure_date }}

% endif % if object.brigade_role:

Role: {{ object.brigade_role }}

% endif

{{ object.partner_id.name }} is in good hands with the Global Brigades team. If you have any urgent concerns, please contact the brigade coordinator directly.

This is an automated notification sent by the Global Brigades program management system. Please do not reply to this email.
